text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is the power of my drink! A triumph for
science!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But... your eyes say this was just coincidence. And
I do concede, rushing to a conclusion based on a
single trial is bad science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I understand what you're trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to repeat this experiment several
times. So go ahead and choose whatever game
you like—racing, fighting, you name it!
